zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Hemenway於1670年9月21日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利時，她的父親Joshua Hemenway27歲，母親Joanna Evans24歲。她於1687年1月11日與Edward Ainsworth在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1748年12月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年78歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Hemenway于1670年9月21日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利时，她的父亲Joshua Hemenway27岁，母亲Joanna Evans24岁。她于1687年1月11日与Edward Ainsworth在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可洛波利结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1748年12月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年78岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: Hemenway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Hemingway  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Hemingway
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from an unidentified place, recorded only in the surname, but which was probably in Southowram (Yorkshire). The origin of the placename may derive from the Old English personal name Hemma + Old English connective -ing- or the groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + weg ‘way, path, road’.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joannah
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. historicEvents.description: Windham County was created from Hartford and New London counties on May 12, 1726

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Hemenway was born on 21 September 1670, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Joshua Hemenway, was 27 and her mother, Joanna Evans, was 24. She married Edward Ainsworth on 11 January 1687, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 23 December 1748, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 78, and was buried in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Hemenway est née le 21 septembre 1670, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Joshua Hemenway, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joanna Evans, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Ainsworth le 11 janvier 1687, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 décembre 1748, à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Hemenway am 21. September 1670 in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Joshua Hemenway 27 und ihre Mutter Joanna Evans 24. Sie hat am 11. Januar 1687 in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Edward Ainsworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Dezember 1748 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Hemenway è nata il il 21 settembre 1670 nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Joshua Hemenway, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Joanna Evans, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Edward Ainsworth il 11 gennaio 1687, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 23 dicembre 1748, nel Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Hemenwayが1670年9月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで生まれた時，父Joshua Hemenwayは27歳，母Joanna Evansは24歳であった。1687年1月11日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーでEdward Ainsworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1748年12月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックで78歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックにて埋葬された。

ko.Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크
ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Hemenway(이)가 1670년 9월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joshua Hemenway(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Evans(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1687년 1월 11일 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에서 Edward Ainsworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1748년 12월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Hemenway nasceu em 21 de setembro de 1670, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Joshua Hemenway, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Evans, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Ainsworth em 11 de janeiro de 1687, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de dezembro de 1748, em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Hemenway родилась 21 сентября 1670 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Joshua Hemenway было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Evans, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Ainsworth 11 января 1687 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 23 декабря 1748 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Hemenway nació el 21 de septiembre de 1670, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Joshua Hemenway, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joanna Evans, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Edward Ainsworth el 11 de enero de 1687, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 23 de diciembre de 1748, en Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
